findings.summary: isCancelRequestedFast returns false for jobs that crashed before cancel request
findings.remediation: Document the coupling between isCancelRequestedFast and resetRunningJobsForKind; consider adding a DB-backfill path on boot that populates cancelledJobIds from durable cancel_requested=1 rows before the fast path is used.

findings.summary: Yield counter first yield at row 200, not guaranteed for small corpora
findings.remediation: None required. 200-row synchronous batch is sub-second.

findings.summary: Causal-chain yield granularity (50 folders) is coarser than metadata-edge (200 rows)
findings.remediation: None required. Folder counts are typically < 100.

findings.summary: shouldAbort checked only at batch-loop top, not between items
findings.remediation: None required. Dual-layer guard (shouldAbort + per-item isCancelled) covers the gap.

findings.summary: cancelledJobIds cleanup verified on both reset and normal completion paths
